<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check initial state vs current
if history:
    first_frame = history[0].frame
    first_nodes = first_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    first_blue = [n for n in first_nodes if n['color'] == 'S']
    print("Initial blue positions:")
    for n in first_blue:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

current_nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
current_blue = [n for n in current_nodes if n['color'] == 'S']
print("\nCurrent blue positions:")
for n in current_blue:
    print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check if there are any other colored objects that might be targets
print("\nAll colored objects (non-B, non-Y, non-O):")
for n in current_nodes:
    if n['color'] not in ('B', 'Y', 'O'):
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
